validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: workflow/runner.py: 22%->100%. Fixed recurring ANSI test failure (test_install_command.py).

completed_work.description: Fixed ANSI test failure in test_install_command.py (recurring issue - strip_ansi helper). Added 22 tests for workflow/runner.py (22%->100%): find_workflow_by_name (7 tests), run_workflow (7 tests), preview_workflow (4 tests), collect_parameters missing-params branch (3 tests). 1307 tests pass.

Added 55 unit tests for distributed_compiler.py (50%->97%). Fixed ANSI test failure in test_install_command.py. All 1339 tests pass (was 1284 passing + 1 failing). Constitution path is '.specify/memory/constitution.md', NOT '.apm/constitution.md'.

Added 32 unit tests for collection_parser.py (0%->100%). Fixed ANSI test failure in test_install_command.py by stripping ANSI escape codes before asserting. All 1307 tests pass (was 1271 passing + 1 failing).

Added 65 unit tests: apm_resolver.py (9%->98%), dependency_graph.py (59%->100%). Tests cover all public methods including _try_load_dependency_package (11 scenarios) and all data structures. Note: tests/test_apm_resolver.py already existed in tests/ root (not run by CI) with 23 tests using src. import prefix; new file in tests/unit/ uses correct imports.

Added 53 unit tests for GitHubTokenManager: coverage 20%->99%. Covers __init__, get_token_for_purpose (all 4 purposes, precedence, empty-string guard), validate_tokens, setup_environment (preserve_existing), _setup_copilot/codex/llm_tokens, _get_available_tokens, convenience functions. Also documented dead code in validate_tokens warning branch (line 126 unreachable).
Added 52 unit tests: core/operations.py (0%->100%, 15 tests), runtime/manager.py (17%->84%, 37 tests). Overall coverage 51%->52%.
Added 41 unit tests: registry/operations.py (6%->88%). Overall coverage 51%->52%.
Added 37 unit tests: package_validator.py (10%->100%). Also fixed UnboundLocalError bug in get_package_info_summary().
